name: storybook-game2d
description: Page-turn story shell on top of game2d — fairy-tale pacing, one idea per page, big touch targets, CRA sequencing, visible celebration. Absorbs the former kids tablet preset. Requires game2d (Pixi stage, physics, audio).

skill.loadWhen: the lesson should feel like a storybook or fairy-tale game — paged scenes, young or story-led learners, CRA order, big touch targets
